BatchAddEniIp.eniId: The ID of the Elastic Network Interface (ENI)
BatchAddEniIp.clientToken: Idempotency token, an ASCII string of up to 64 characters. See [ClientToken Idempotency Support](VPC/API参考/通用说明.md#幂等性)
BatchAddEniIp.isIpv6: Whether to assign an IPv6 address. Set to true to assign an IPv6 address; defaults to false for IPv4
BatchAddEniIp.privateIpAddresses: Specified private IP address list, up to 10 per request. At least one of privateIpAddresses or privateIpAddressCount must be provided
BatchAddEniIp.privateIpAddressCount: Number of private IP addresses to apply for, maximum 10. At least one of privateIpAddresses or privateIpAddressCount must be provided
